title: Netherite Without Templates
description: Removes the need for an upgrade template to transform Diamond gear into Netherite at the Smithing Table, mimicking 1.19 behavior.
body:
If you wish that smithing Netherite gear didn't require an upgrade template like it did before 1.20, this datapack solves that issue. It provides the following benefits:

- Netherite smithing only requires the Diamond gear and a Netherite Ingot.
- Netherite Upgrades do not generate in loot chests, at all.
- Existing upgrades can be crafted into a single diamond and the duping recipe has been removed.
- Supports Aether, Traveler's Backpack, and Farmer's Delight.

**The single datapack supports everything from 1.20 to 26.1.2.**
